Anna.primary_clothing: light-blue dress with a veiled hat featuring a powder blue ribbon
Anna.face_description: beautiful pair of eyes hidden with sorrow; frequently bites her lower lip in anxiety
Anna.visual_anchor: melancholic young woman with sorrowful eyes, wearing a light-blue Victorian dress and a veiled hat with a powder blue ribbon
Anna.color_palette: light blue, powder blue, pale ivory, soft brown
Anna.accessories: hat with a light blue ribbon
Anna.source_notes: Text describes her hat and eyes during the consultation.
Anna.era_clothing_lock: light-blue Victorian day dress, matching veiled hat with a powder blue ribbon, silk gloves

Joyce Meyer.face_description: Sun-hollowed cheeks with deep circles under haunted grey eyes; sharp nose and thin, trembling lips.
Joyce Meyer.visual_anchor: A pale young man with haunted, wide eyes and a trembling smile, wearing a salt-stained charcoal Victorian morning coat and a rumpled white shirt.
Joyce Meyer.color_palette: pitch black, golden blond, pale ivory, charcoal grey
Joyce Meyer.distinguishing_features: haggard appearance from a traumatic journey, joyful glint in eyes
Joyce Meyer.source_notes: Updated with physical signs of trauma and clothing description following his survival of the Alfalfa ordeal.
Joyce Meyer.unique_identifier: trembling pale smile and haunted, wide-eyed expression resulting from sea-travel trauma
Joyce Meyer.era_clothing_lock: salt-stained charcoal Victorian morning coat, rumpled white cotton shirt without a cravat, dark trousers, and scuffed leather boots

Mr. Wayne.primary_clothing: Victorian gentleman's indoor suit, dark charcoal waistcoat, white shirt
Mr. Wayne.face_description: Mature face with kind but inquisitive eyes, clean-shaven, dignified expression.
Mr. Wayne.visual_anchor: Late 40s male, salt and pepper hair, neat Victorian indoor suit, mature face with inquisitive brown eyes.

Mrs. Wayne.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian house dress, dark blue with lace collar
Mrs. Wayne.face_description: Gentle face with soft features, maternal and caring expression.
Mrs. Wayne.visual_anchor: Mid-40s female, brown hair in a bun, wearing a dark blue Victorian house dress with a lace collar, gentle maternal face.
Mrs. Wayne.source_notes: Mentioned as part of the Wayne couple, parents of Anna.

Nast.primary_clothing: Victorian pirate captain attire, dark heavy leather coat, tricorne hat, gold embroidery
Nast.face_description: Weathered skin with sharp, authoritative eyes and a firm jawline. Looks like a seasoned commander of the seas.
Nast.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male pirate captain, tanned weathered skin, sharp dark brown eyes, wearing a dark leather coat and a tricorne hat, imposing presence.
Nast.color_palette: oceanic blue, gold, weathered leather brown, deep black
Nast.distinguishing_features: Claims to be a descendant of the Solomon Empire; follows a personal code of not killing captives.
Nast.role: Pirate King of the Five Seas
Nast.source_notes: Confirmed as the 'King of the Five Seas' and his self-proclaimed imperial lineage.

Tris.primary_clothing: Simple linen shirt, dark vest, worn trousers
Tris.face_description: Round, amiable, and soft facial features with a shy, youthful expression often described as being like a girl.
Tris.visual_anchor: A shy, unremarkable young man with a round, amiable face and soft features, wearing a simple Victorian wool waistcoat and flat cap.
Tris.color_palette: pale cream, light brown, muted grey
Tris.distinguishing_features: Very shy demeanor, good conversationalist when familiar
Tris.source_notes: Detailed physical description provided through Joyce's memory; confirmed as a conversationalist to those he knows.
Tris.unique_identifier: round, amiable face with an unmistakable shy expression; unremarkable boy who retreats to corners
Tris.era_clothing_lock: simple Victorian beige wool waistcoat, white cotton shirt, brown wool trousers, and a modest brown flat cap

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s pale male with a scholarly bearing, wearing a halved black top hat and a black Victorian frock coat, frequently using a topaz spirit pendulum on a silver chain
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: exquisite-looking silver chain with a chunk of pure topaz (spirit pendulum) kept in the left sleeve
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Performed his first professional divination using multiple techniques.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: black Victorian frock coat, halved black top hat, starched white shirt, scholarly bearing
Klein Moretti.unique_identifier: always wears a black top hat split in half (halved top hat) and carries a silver chain with a pure topaz pendulum in his left sleeve

Angelica.hair_style: long hair coiled in a mature, elegant style
Angelica.visual_anchor: mature and elegant woman with brownish-yellow long hair coiled, wearing a Victorian attendant's outfit
Angelica.distinguishing_features: Develops a subtle, unknown fear of Klein Moretti due to his accurate divinations.
Angelica.role: Receptionist and staff member of the Tingen Divination Club
Angelica.source_notes: Updated to reflect her changing perception of Klein.

Glacis.primary_clothing: formal suit with a black bow tie
Glacis.face_description: Slightly dark skin with dark green pupils, topped with soft light yellow hair
Glacis.visual_anchor: frail male with soft blond hair and a monocle hanging over a formal Victorian suit with a black bow tie
Glacis.color_palette: black, white, light yellow, dark green
Glacis.distinguishing_features: Slightly dark skin, dark green pupils
Glacis.source_notes: Chapter 49 provides specific details: soft blond hair, monocle, black bow tie, and a formal suit.
Glacis.era_clothing_lock: formal Victorian suit with a black bow tie, monocle hanging from a chain, polished leather shoes

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: decrepit appearance, resembles Klein but lacks a scholarly air
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: literate, employed at an import and export company, resourceful and calculating — negotiated gas pipe installation to avoid debt
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Mentions his weekly salary (1 pound 10 soli) and his goal to study accountancy and grammar.
Benson Moretti.era_clothing_lock: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat

Melissa Moretti.skin_tone: pale, slightly thin-faced but with lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: Teenage girl with a focused expression, often tinkering with Victorian clockwork parts, wearing a simple linen blouse and a dark work apron.
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.distinguishing_features: Frequently tinkers with gears, bearings, and springs; vocal advocate for women's education.
Melissa Moretti.faction: Tingen Technical School — Steam and Machinery department student
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Added specific details about her mechanical hobbies and her reaction to the Shauds' traditionalist views.
Melissa Moretti.unique_identifier: tattered inherited veil cap and self-sewn school bag; brown eyes fixed in a habitual expression of calm exasperation toward her brothers

Mrs. Shaud.hair_style: swept up in a sophisticated pompadour style
Mrs. Shaud.face_description: Elegant high cheekbones, thin refined nose, and a composed, dignified expression.
Mrs. Shaud.visual_anchor: Mid-30s woman with auburn hair in a pompadour and grey eyes, wearing an emerald green Victorian walking suit and holding an ivory-handled lace parasol.
Mrs. Shaud.color_palette: emerald green, jet black, ivory, auburn
Mrs. Shaud.accessories: Ivory-handled parasol, tortoise shell calling card case
Mrs. Shaud.faction: Church of the Lord of Storms
Mrs. Shaud.source_notes: Updated with her social demeanor and religious/educational beliefs.
Mrs. Shaud.unique_identifier: always carries an ivory-handled parasol with intricate black lace trimming
Mrs. Shaud.era_clothing_lock: emerald green wool walking suit with black velvet lapels, a matching bonnet adorned with a small ostrich feather, and black leather gloves
